name: tag-input
description: Build a list of tags one at a time — Enter or comma to add, Backspace or ✕ to remove. Duplicates and blanks are ignored, additions and removals are announced.

notes: The tags are a labelled list, each with a 'Remove {tag}' button
Additions and removals are announced via a polite live region
Keeps a native text input; Backspace on an empty input removes the last tag

intents: a tag / chip input for keywords or labels
add and remove tags one at a time
a multi-value text field with removable chips
